name: Papa Joe's Cucumber and Red Onion Soup
recipeInstructions:
This is from Alice Brock at Alice's Restaurant. Yes, THAT one.
1. Peel and slice cucumbers as thinly as possible.
2. Peel and slice red onions as thinly as possible. It's easier if you cut the onion in half and slice the cut side down.
3. Use a deep 1-gallon bowl or crock. Alternate layers of cucumber slices and onion slices with sprinkles of salt and sugar between each layer. This will draw out the juices, making it soup.
4. Pile sour cream on top. Do not stir.
5. Cover and refrigerate for at least 24 hours.
6. To serve, add fresh dill weed and lemon juice and gently stir. Add more lemon juice or sugar to taste.
Cool and refreshing, this is perfect when it's too hot to cook and cucumbers are abundant.
